name: open multiple files at runtime (sidebar/drag path) -> ONE window, tabs
comment: Exercises EditorWindowController.openFiles(at:) — the same entry point the sidebar single-click, editor file-drop, and Recent list use — via the --open-files launch hook (which calls openFiles(at:) ~1s after launch). Three files must land as TABS in one window, not separate windows. Requires the Debug build (sandbox off) and staged fixtures.
